Another pick that probably won't do well, but I thought it fit.

For the uninitiated, First Love was a big hit at a time when few international songs became big hits overseas.  and it was kind of like Jewel or Olivia Rodrigo - you associated it with sad girls (or sad boys) writing poetry that they would be embarrassed by a month later.  She went on to have a pretty strong career singing slightly unusual dance-pop songs.

Anyway, I hadn't listened for a long time until she came up on my feed again because I follow the _other_ artist on this track.  I haven't seen the movie this song came from but it does have a great "final credits" feel.  I like the jazz lounge bits too.
